notes: Run 1. Serena LSP EOF errors - fell back to grep/read. Findings: missing context in HTTP/subprocess, error propagation gaps.
Run 2. Serena LSP operational. Found verbose-only error silencing in AuditWorkflowRun, redundant AnomalyReport fields, inconsistent NewAnomalyDetector constructor.
Run 3. Extended constructor consistency from agentdrain to cli. Type assertion scan: 5 total in pkg/, all safe comma-ok. Found 1 http.NewRequest without context, redundant double type assertion.
Run 4. Resource lifecycle (defer Close): double-close in fileutil.CopyFile. Concurrency: 6 prod goroutines in pkg/; docker_images.go:148 + spinner.go:140 missing defer recover().

Run 5. Enumerated every non-test func in pkg/ by line count. 17 funcs >400 lines. Issues: extractSafeOutputsConfig 637 lines / 45 repeated parse-and-assign blocks (#31298, table-driven); DownloadWorkflowLogs 513 lines + 26 params (options struct); tracker #31300 for remaining 12. LSP finding: bare receiver-method names like 'extractSafeOutputsConfig' return [] from find_symbol - must qualify as '(*Compiler).extractSafeOutputsConfig'.

Run 6. 50% cached: extended Run 5 param-list flag. Grep pattern '^func [^(]*(...){9,}\)' found 11 funcs with >=10 params. Cluster: RunUpdateWorkflows->UpdateWorkflows->updateWorkflow trio all 14 params forwarded verbatim (#aw_sg6p1). Codebase already has CompileConfig as model. 50% new: depth-nesting scan. Worst: parseToolCallsWithSequence (claude_logs.go:333-425) 7-deep type-assertion ladder depth-11 (#aw_sg6n1). Tracker #aw_sg6p2 catalogues 8 remaining >=10-param funcs. Bash policy blocks running scripts on /dev/null - must Grep/Read directly. Serena qualified-method form reconfirmed.

Run 7. 50% cached: extended Run 5 complexity scan to switch/case axis - ranked 195 files in pkg/ by case-count. Top: frontmatter_parsing.go 58, permissions.go 49, imports.go 45, safe_outputs_permissions.go 35, mcp_config_custom.go 34. 50% new: exported-symbol usage audit via Serena find_referencing_symbols (note: find_symbol with name_path_pattern takes 70s+ on broad queries - prefer Grep for plain name lookups). KEY FINDING: 8 parallel dispatch tables keyed by SafeOutputs handler-type, explicitly documented in safe_outputs_state.go:16-21 as a maintenance hazard - and the comment itself UNDERSTATES the count by half (says 4, actually 8). Three issues: #aw_sg7a1 (8-way dispatch table refactor), #aw_sg7a2 (convertStringToPermissionScope 49-case identity switch collapsible to map lookup), #aw_sg7a3 (parsePermissionsConfig 40-case scope->struct-field switch duplicating permission inventory 4th time). gh CLI 403 in sandbox blocked duplicate detection - proceeded via safeoutputs.
